title: podocarpus neglectus
intro: Podocarpus neglectus, also known as the Yellow Wood or Yellow Podocarp, is a small, evergreen tree native to the subtropical regions of South Africa. The medicinal properties of Podocarpus neglectus include its high concentration of terpenes, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of using this plant include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Podocarpus neglectus can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
